reviews.review_msg: she talks, you listen - do not dare interrupt, do not dare ask questions, do not dare to contradict her. If you can do that its an easy A, just forget most of what you learned because somehow despite having a textbook, she got it wrong.

she talks, you listen - do not dare interrupt, do not dare ask questions, do not dare to contradict her. If you can do that its an easy A, just forget most of what you learned because somehow despite having a textbook, she got it wrong.

Great prof, easily top 3! Had him Crim 413 and 417 and must say he was one of the best lecturers and overall great individual! The exams consist of broad questions that if you went to lecture, you would know roughly what would be asked. Super helpful during office hours and very encouraging. Just don't be rude to him, and everything will be A Ok.
Definitely did not like this class at all. AMybe it was the content, maybe it was the prof.

conflict in schools, aka RJ in schools.. amazingly interesting class taught by.  a prof that loves and writes on the subject. journals are like 315, so pretty simple. presentation were very interesting... overall i really enjoyed this class, and brenda knows a lot of this subject. Like usual brenda is pretty laid back, and her marking is the same.

Took Crime in Literature with him over summer and found him to be a very personable teacher, open to questions/comments/suggestions, and exceptionally lenient with the Crim students (for a literature class). He treats students with respect and is a fair grader, no suprises if you come prepared for discussion.
gorgeous. wanna wrap myself up in his arms. je t'aime m. bouchard!!

The best course I have taken in the criminology side of my degree, I would 100% take another hybrid course or TA for her. Lectures/discussions were great. Greer listens to students' needs and accommodates everyone. Exams were a breeze because of the materials online and we discuss them in class the next week. The paper was fun to write too! 10/10!!

A true queen. Super supportive and was willing to adjust the course due to zoom university. Overall 20/10 would recommend a course with Dr. Greer any day and I highly recommend a drug policy course with the queen herself since she is super knowledgeable and it's one of the few courses in my undergraduate that I actually learned something....
Great prof, interesting lectures. very helpful. study his notes for exam, no txt book needed.

Designed a special topics course himself about radicalization and extremism that was very interesting. The assignments (a media analysis paper looked at messages in a movie, extremist profile paper analyzed an online forum, proposed countering violent extremist program) were all awesome. Fair marker, good assignment outlines. Would take again!!
